assessments.intro: Take skill assessments to showcase your abilities and improve your match score with employers.

technical.title: Technical Skills Assessment
technical.description: Evaluate your technical knowledge and problem-solving abilities

communication.title: Communication Skills
communication.description: Test your verbal and written communication abilities

industry.title: Industry Knowledge
industry.description: Demonstrate your understanding of industry best practices

inProgress.title: Assessment in Progress
inProgress.simulationNote: This is a simulated assessment for demo purposes. In a real application, you would answer questions to demonstrate your skills.

completed.title: Assessment Completed!
completed.message: Your results have been verified and added to your profile.

completeToast.title: Assessment Completed!
completeToast.description: You scored {{score}}%. Your match score has been updated.

notAvailable.title: Assessments Not Available
notAvailable.message: Assessments are only available for individual job seekers.
